initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(AvgScrMath) AS avg_math_score, schools.County
FROM satscores
JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode
GROUP BY satscores.cds, schools.County
ORDER BY AVG(AvgScrRead) ASC, AVG(AvgScrWrite) ASC, AVG(AvgScrMath) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT AVG(AvgScrMath) AS avg_math_score, schools.County

GROUP BY satscores.cds, schools.County
ORDER BY AVG(AvgScrRead) ASC, AVG(AvgScrWrite) ASC, AVG(AvgScrMath) ASC
LIMIT 1;
